name: emw-relion-mask_create
help: Create a 3D mask using relion_mask_create. Two modes: (1) From volume — binarize an input map with a threshold; (2) De novo — create a spherical/circular mask from box size and radii.

params.name: relion_mask_create.denovo
params.label: De novo creation:
params.help: If true, create mask from box size and radii (no input volume). If false, create mask by thresholding an input volume.

params.name: relion_mask_create.volume.i
params.label: Input volume:
params.help: Input map (MRC) to threshold for generating the binary mask. Passed as --i to relion_mask_create.

params.name: relion_mask_create.volume.ini_threshold
params.label: Initial threshold:
params.help: Threshold for binarization (--ini_threshold). Pixels above this value become 1 in the initial mask.

params.name: relion_mask_create.volume.extend_inimask
params.label: Extend mask (px):
params.help: Extend the initial binary mask by this number of pixels (--extend_inimask).

params.name: relion_mask_create.volume.width_soft_edge
params.label: Soft edge width (px):
params.help: Width in pixels of the soft edge on the binary mask (--width_soft_edge).

params.name: relion_mask_create.volume.lowpass
params.label: Lowpass (Å):
params.help: Lowpass filter in Angstroms applied to the input map before binarization (--lowpass). Use -1 or leave empty for none.

params.name: relion_mask_create.volume.angpix
params.label: Pixel size (Å):
params.help: Pixel size in Angstroms for the lowpass filter (--angpix). Use -1 to read from map header.

params.name: relion_mask_create.denovo.box_size
params.label: Box size (px):
params.help: Box size of the mask in pixels (--box_size). Required for de novo creation.

params.name: relion_mask_create.denovo.inner_radius
params.label: Inner radius (px):
params.help: Inner radius of the masked region in pixels (--inner_radius).

params.name: relion_mask_create.denovo.outer_radius
params.label: Outer radius (px):
params.help: Outer radius of the mask region in pixels (--outer_radius).
